root.sql: SELECT SC_LON_M_CONTRACT_COLL.LOAN_CONTRACT_NO ,SC_LON_M_LOAN_CARD.MEMBERSHIP_NO ,pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name(SC_LON_M_LOAN_CARD.MEMBERSHIP_NO) as membername , pka_com_function.fp_get_group_name_mem(SC_LON_M_LOAN_CARD.MEMBERSHIP_NO) as gropname , SC_LON_M_LOAN_CARD.PRINCIPAL_BALANCE , SC_LON_M_CONTRACT_COLL.REF_OWN_NO , SC_LON_M_CONTRACT_COLL.COLLATERAL_DESCRIPTION ,sc_atm_lon_card.MODIFY_STATUS FROM SC_LON_M_CONTRACT_COLL, SC_MEM_M_MEMBERSHIP_REGISTERED, SC_LON_M_LOAN_CARD, sc_atm_lon_card WHERE ( sc_atm_lon_card.LOAN_CONTRACT_NO = SC_LON_M_CONTRACT_COLL.LOAN_CONTRACT_NO ) and ( SC_LON_M_CONTRACT_COLL.REF_OWN_NO = SC_MEM_M_MEMBERSHIP_REGISTERED.MEMBERSHIP_NO ) and ( SC_LON_M_LOAN_CARD.LOAN_CONTRACT_NO = sc_atm_lon_card.LOAN_CONTRACT_NO ) and ( ( sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_type = 'ก' ) AND ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_status_code = '3' ) AND ( sc_lon_m_contract_coll.status = '0' ) AND ( sc_atm_lon_card.modify_status = '0' ) ) and SC_LON_M_LOAN_CARD.PRINCIPAL_BALANCE > 0
